title: Delicate Roasted Italian Butternut Squash Pilaf
description: A light and flavorful Italian-inspired dish featuring roasted butternut squash, prosciutto, and arborio rice, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Toss the cubed butternut squash with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the squash in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a large saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the prosciutto and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the prosciutto from the saucepan and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the arborio rice to the saucepan and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth to the saucepan, 1 cup at a time, stirring constantly and allowing each cup to be absorbed before adding the next.
Once the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed, stir in the grated parmesan cheese.
Add the roasted butternut squash, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the top of the pilaf and serve immediately.
